techniques.technique: near-monochrome cool technical field broken by ONE reserved warm accent on the single most important element
techniques.reference: maltego (#ffb30f on #303849) + kali (#fea44c CTA on #367BF0/#010409 field)

techniques.technique: one COLORED accent shadow/glow on the focal element (not gray drop-shadows everywhere)
techniques.reference: maltego 10px 10px #ffb30f hard-offset + kali drop-shadow 20px 20px 20px #153f86 dragon glow

techniques.technique: authority via a light-weight, tight-tracked headline (not heavy shouting weight)
techniques.reference: maltego H1 weight 300 / -2px / 78px; kali H1 weight 400

techniques.technique: real monospace face reserved for machine truth (IOCs, rules, verbatim source spans)
techniques.reference: maltego Roboto Mono; kali system mono; product need = IOC/rule/span fidelity
